checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /login — no password field (possibly SSO/OAuth only)

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 3 JSON-LD blocks: Corporation, Organization, WebPage
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 208 divs with only 16 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 17/63 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 4/4 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 17 headings, well-structured
11 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 403 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~77,456 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 22 — moderately nested
Reading this page costs $0.10–$1.16 per load ($0.48–$5.81 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Missing essential landmarks: main
4/33 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 1 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
2 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 102ms
Moderate payload: 303KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 2 scripts, 2 styles, 33 images
Compression enabled: gzip
